Default Prove Up Hearing In Scd 218
Off Calendar Sep-21-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Robert M. Sellards, Esq. for Plaintiff: Pietro and Pietro.
Plaintiff's Witness: John Pietro, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Armin Riaz and Azadeh Riaz as follows:
Damages $80,841.87
Prejudgment Interest $29,748.22
Attorney's Fees $3,115.00
Costs $465.50 for a total of $114,170.59
Judgment signed in open court.
